notes: Verbatim, BOUNDED corpus of the Idaho court rules an Idaho civil-practice / family-law drafter actually cites, fetched by scripts/pull_idaho_rules.py from the Idaho Supreme Court per-rule print views (https://isc.idaho.gov/rules-procedure/print/<slug>/<rule>; the -new landing pages are JavaScript-rendered and are not usable for extraction). Each set file carries the verbatim rule text under '## Rule N. Title' headings. Widen a set by adding rule numbers to its 'rules' list. A rule whose print page is missing is skipped (not emitted as a gap); a set in which every rule fails is written as a pointer stub; a _file_is_stub guard preserves committed verbatim content on a failed run (pass --force to overwrite). I.R.E.F.S. (electronic filing/service) is referenced for filing mechanics but not snapshotted as a dedicated file.

targets.name: Idaho Rules of Family Law Procedure
Idaho Rules for Electronic Filing and Service
